title: Ration pier ward
text: A pier ward where ration chits buy more loyalty than coin; cranes, mold, and night work define the streets.

title: Flood-meadow village
text: A soft river village with ferry gossip, reed crafts, and mysteries that stay human-sized.

title: Cliffside outer sect
text: An outer courtyard on a cliff path where face is currency and tea can be a challenge.
examples: guest seat that insults a rival

title: Skyfall scaffold city
text: Scaffold towns bolted to broken towers after the sky cracked; status windows paint half-real quests on rust.

title: Mecha school hangar dorm
text: A hangar-adjacent dorm where spare parts are more precious than grades and curfew is a combat drill.

title: Salt caravan road
text: A caravan road that smells of salt and wheel grease; every well has a price and a rumor.
examples: toll that is really a test

title: Flooded archive cellar
text: A cellar archive where ledgers float and mold eats names; bureaucracy is a dungeon.

title: Dock ledger guild
text: A dock guild that owns who may unload; debts are tracked more carefully than lives.

title: Scaffold scav clique
text: A tight scavenger clique that shares maps only with people who have bled for them.

title: Outer-court allies
text: Junior disciples who trade tips for face-saving favors; slow cultivation, fast gossip.

title: Ferry board aunties
text: An informal board of ferry workers and market aunties who decide who gets help before the storm.
examples: who rides free after a good deed

title: Window-priests
text: People who treat status windows as scripture and sell 'blessed' interface charms of dubious worth.
